headline: Mondelēz International Scales Up Human Rights Due Diligence Across Own Operations and Supply Chain
summary: Releases Annual 2025 Progress ReportAchieves ~100% Child Labor Monitoring and Remediation Systems (CLMRS) coverage of Cocoa Life communities in West Africa1Achieves ~100% SMETA audit coverage across our owned manufacturing plants over the past 3 yearsExpands Human Rights Due Diligence (HRDD) coverage of suppliers and audited ~1,200+ suppliers CHICAGO , June 11, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Mondelēz International, Inc.
